---
title: "\'G.F.S. Holiday visits of two London girls\'. By Miss Yonge."
---

## \'G.F.S. Holiday visits of two London girls\'. By Miss Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1897
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Short Story in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (July 1897) 232-4.

### Notes

In the form of 2 letters sent from \'Langley\' showing contrasting responses to the country: one bored, one enchanted.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
